query: Top 10 state agencies by total 2024 expenditures render this to a Miro board

intent.thinking: The user wants to identify the top 10 state agencies in Texas based on their total expenditures for the fiscal year 2024 and visualize this data on a Miro board.

steps.rationale: To calculate the total expenditures for each state agency in 2024 and identify the top 10 agencies by expenditure.

args.title: Top 10 Texas State Agencies by 2024 Expenditures
args.summary: This visualization shows the top 10 state agencies in Texas ranked by their total expenditures for the fiscal year 2024.

answer: The top 10 Texas state agencies by total 2024 expenditures have been visualized on a Miro board. The Texas Department of Transportation leads with 2,281 expenditure entries, followed by the Parks & Wildlife Department with 1,882 and the Health and Human Services Commission with 1,750. You can view the full breakdown on the linked Miro board.
